typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	Data_Src as string (),
	DW_Run_Cncl_Dt as timestamp (),
	DW_Run_Eff_dt as timestamp (),
	DW_Run_Key as integer (),
	DW_Run_Month as integer (),
	monthyear as string (),
	new_Data as string (),
	NoOfMonths as string (),
	Password as string (),
	projectResourceSK as integer (),
	projectSK as integer (),
	SQL as string (),
	SQL1 as string (),
	taskCategoryTypeSK as integer (),
	timesheetdateSK as timestamp (),
	timesheetmonth as integer (),
	timesheetyear as integer (),
	User_Name as string (),
	var_BCC as string (),
	var_CC as string (),
	var_Dest_Conn as string (),
	var_Email_From as string (),
	var_Email_Subject as string (),
	var_Email_To as string (),
	var_Error_Description as string (),
	var_Error_Flag as integer (),
	var_Initial_Catalog as string (),
	var_SMTP_Server as string ()
}

source(output(
		TimeTaken as integer,
		TimeSheetProjectSK as integer,
		TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK as integer,
		TimeSheetDateSK as timestamp,
		TimeTakenHR as integer,
		TimesheetProjectResourceSk as integer,
		ProjectResourcePmPodEnableFlag as string,
		ProjectResourceEnableTimesheetFlag as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        TimeSheetSK, TimeSheetID, TimeSheetTitle, TimeSheetDate, TimeTaken, TimeSheetMajorTaskSK, TimeSheetProjectSK, TimeSheetProjectResourceSK,                           TimeSheetTaskCategorySK, TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK, TimeSheetMinorTaskSk, TimeSheetDateSK, DW_Run_Key, DW_Create_Datetime,                           DW_Update_Datetime, TimeTakenHR, TimeSheetDefectSk FROM            dw.F_TimeSheet WHERE        (DATEPART(mm, TimeSheetDate)= ?) AND (DATEPART(yyyy, TimeSheetDate) =                              (SELECT        DATEPART(yyyy, Run_Eff_DT) AS Expr1                                FROM            dbo.Ctrl_Run                                WHERE        (Status_Code = \'Running\')))',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLESRCTimeSheet
OLESRCTimeSheet derive(TimeSheetDateSK = iif(isNull(TimeSheetDateSK), toDate(toString($User__DW_Run_Eff_dt, 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy"), toDate(toString(TimeSheetDateSK, 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy")),
		Dw_run_key = $User__DW_Run_Key) ~> DERForCheckNullDate
DERForCheckNullDate derive(Month_Year_Number = toString(month(TimeSheetDateSK)) + '-' + toString(year(TimeSheetDateSK))) ~> DERForConvertintoMonthYear
DERForConvertintoMonthYear aggregate(groupBy(TimesheetProjectResourceSk,TimeSheetProjectSK,TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK,Month_Year_Number),
	TimeTaken = sum(TimeTaken),
		TimeTakenHR = sum(TimeTakenHR),
		{DER For Check Null Date.TimeSheetDateSK} = max(TimeSheetDateSK)) ~> AGGforMonthlyaggregate
AGGforMonthlyaggregate derive(dw_Run_Key = $User__DW_Run_Key) ~> DERForDWrunkeyKey
DERForDWrunkeyKey sink(input(
		AM_TimeSheetMonthYear as string,
		AM_TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK as integer,
		TimeTaken as integer,
		AM_TimeSheetProjectResourceSK as integer,
		AM_TimeSheetProjectSK as integer,
		AM_MAXDateOfMonth as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		TimeTakenHR as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		AM_TimeSheetMonthYear = Month_Year_Number,
		AM_TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK = TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK,
		TimeTaken,
		AM_TimeSheetProjectResourceSK = TimesheetProjectResourceSk,
		AM_TimeSheetProjectSK = TimeSheetProjectSK,
		AM_MAXDateOfMonth = {DER For Check Null Date.TimeSheetDateSK},
		DW_Run_Key = dw_Run_Key,
		TimeTakenHR)) ~> OLEDSTAMTimeSheet
